requirement_topic.zh: 运输申报与锂产品处理
requirement_topic.zht: 運輸申報與鋰產品處理

summary.en: Lithium batteries, battery packs, and power banks must follow Class 9 dangerous-goods documentation and handling logic for air or sea. UN 38.3 is the baseline test standard for shipment readiness and should be linked to model declarations for SoTR content, labels, and handling condition in the UAE-bound move (including Jebel Ali and Khalifa workflows).
summary.zh: 锂电池、 电池组和移动电源在运输中按第9类危险品处理，需按空运或海运申报流程执行。UN 38.3是出运前的基础试验标准，应与型号声明中的SoTR、标签和处理条件关联，覆盖阿联酋目的地（含杰贝阿里与哈利法）流程。
summary.zht: 鋰電池、電池組及行動電源在運輸中按第9類危險品處理，需按空運或海運申報流程執行。UN 38.3是出運前的基礎試驗標準，應與型號聲明中的SoTR、標籤及處理條件關聯，涵蓋阿聯酋目的地（含傑貝阿里與哈利法）流程。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3
ICAO Technical Instructions for the Safe Transport of Dangerous Goods by Air
IMDG Code for maritime dangerous goods movements

summary.en: Chinese logistics packets commonly include UN 38.3 reports and domestic dangerous-goods rules. These are essential for export readiness, but destination handling at UAE ports can still require additional recipient- and forwarder-facing controls and SoTR mapping.
summary.zh: 中国物流包通常含UN 38.3报告及国内危险品规则，这是出口准备的基础，但阿联酋港口侧仍可能要求额外的收货人/承运人流程控制与SoTR映射。
summary.zht: 中國物流包通常包含UN 38.3報告及國內危險品規則，這是出口準備基礎，但阿聯酋港口側仍可能要求額外的收貨人／承運人流程控制與SoTR映射。

standards_or_laws: CAAC dangerous goods rules for departures in China
Chinese hazardous cargo document templates and declarations

gap.en: Export teams often have test evidence but not full destination-side operational alignment for UAE logistics acceptance. Missing destination-specific SoTR mapping, label language, and consignee readiness are frequent blockers at clearance and pre-delivery stages.
gap.zh: 出口团队常有测试证据，却缺少对阿联酋物流验收的完整目标流程对齐。目的地SoTR映射、标签语言、收货方处理准备不足，是清关与交付前常见阻塞点。
gap.zht: 出口團隊常有測試證據，卻缺少對阿聯酋物流驗收的完整目標流程對齊。目的地SoTR映射、標籤語言、收貨方處理準備不足，是清關與交付前常見阻塞點。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for all lithium battery cargo that is transported as dangerous goods; additional destination checks may be applied by carriers and UAE destination handling chains.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in the Chinese export process for dangerous-goods documentation and transport compliance, but this does not complete UAE destination-side logistics controls by itself.

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Keep UN 38.3 as a base layer, then bridge to destination-specific handling and consignee-capability checks for UAE entry, port operations, and documentation acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将UN 38.3作为基础，再衔接阿联酋目的地处理能力核验、港口作业和单证接受要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將UN 38.3作為基礎，再銜接阿聯酋目的地處理能力核驗、港口作業與單證接受要求。
